espaciosTrabajo.descripcion: Temporary areas and persistent spaces defined by a natural language criterion. Visible only to you, your area, or the entire entity.
espaciosTrabajo.ayudaArea: Any user whose assigned area matches will see this Workspace.
espaciosTrabajo.criterioPlaceholder: Ex: Documents about 2024 tenders in Pirque with status VECTORIZED
espaciosTrabajo.ayudaCriterio: This is the filter that defines the set of documents. When you click Refresh, the system reapplies this criterion.
espaciosTrabajo.soloCreadorRenombra: Only the creator can rename the workspace.
espaciosTrabajo.errorAreaRequerida: You must select an area when the scope is AREA.
espaciosTrabajo.eliminarMensaje: Delete workspace "{nombre}"? This action cannot be undone.
espaciosTrabajo.sinResultados: You don't have any Workspaces yet. Create one with the New button.

procesarPipeline.irADocumentos: After synchronizing folders, go to the tab

procesarPipeline.sinDocumentosPendientes: There are no pending documents to process. If you have just indexed files, press

procesarPipeline.ayudaCargarDesdeDirectorio: Use "Index Locations from Directory" to index from a folder on your computer.

limpieza.subtitulo: Manual maintenance of log-type tables. Cleanup by time removes rows older than N days. Cleanup by quantity keeps the last N rows and deletes the rest.
limpieza.accesoRestringidoMensaje: This feature is only available to super-administrators of the ADMIN group.
limpieza.opcionPorTiempo: By Time (delete older than N days)
limpieza.avisoPreservaResumen: This table preserves a monthly summary before deletion (LLM costs by group/provider/model).
limpieza.confirmarMensajeTiempo: All rows in "{tabla}" older than {valor} days will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
limpieza.confirmarMensajeCantidad: The last {valor} rows in "{tabla}" will be kept, and the rest will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
limpieza.confirmarTodasMensaje: {count} active policies will be executed with their current configuration. This action cannot be undone.

prompts.vistasGenerarSqlDesc: executes the LLM on each prompt_view and saves the SQL.
prompts.vistasSincronizarDesc: applies the SQL in DB (DROP VIEW IF EXISTS CASCADE + CREATE VIEW + GRANT chat_readonly).
prompts.mensajesUiDesc2: from the frontend. Generates EN, PT, FR, DE from Spanish. Once generated, download each file and replace it in
prompts.reemplazaArchivos2: and commit+push for Vercel to deploy with the new texts.
prompts.jerarquiasDesc: Refreshes the closure table (denormalized graph) for each hierarchy by recomputing it from the source table. In normal operation, refresh is done automatically when editing a node; this panel is for massive rebuild if it became desynchronized.
prompts.apisDesc3: . LLMs only access via this table.
prompts.grafoDesc3: crossed with FKs. Does not overwrite arcs with manual code (preserves
prompts.grafoDesc4: ). Also triggers the regeneration of RAG's virtual documents in the background. Super-admin only.
prompts.grafoFooter1: To synchronize a SINGLE function, use the button
prompts.erroresDuranteGeneracion: {total, plural, one {# error during generation} other {# errors during generation}}
prompts.apisRegeneradasOk: APIs regenerated: {upserted} endpoints from {total} rows of v_funcion_api.

tiposTarea.subtitulo: Task types by category for the active group

traducciones.subtitulo: Language management and automatic catalog translation generation
traducciones.errorSinTraducciones: Generation finished but no translations were saved. Check server logs.
traducciones.seccionGeneracionDescripcion: Translations are automatically generated with AI (Gemini Flash) for all active languages. Generation runs in the background — you can browse freely while it progresses.
traducciones.idiomasSoportadosDesc: Only active languages are shown in the system's selector
traducciones.notaTexto1: For a new language to function completely in the system, in addition to registering it here, it is necessary to create the message file
traducciones.notaTexto2: and add it to the array
traducciones.notaTexto4: , and then deploy. Predefined languages (ES, EN, PT, FR, DE) already have their message files included.
traducciones.modalRegenerarTodoMensaje: Translations for all active languages ({idiomas}) will be regenerated. Generation runs in the background, and you can continue browsing. Continue?
traducciones.modalEliminarIdiomaMensaje: All translations generated for {nombre} ({codigo}) will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
traducciones.notaIdiomaNuevo: The language will be created. To use it in the system, you must first add its message file to the project and deploy.
traducciones.seccionGlosarioDescripcion: The glossary is generated from Server_LM.md (product document) and injected as context into all system translations. It is the single source of truth for terminology.
traducciones.glosarioInexistente: No glossary yet. Click "Regenerate Glossary" to generate it from Server_LM.md.
traducciones.descripcionGeneracionConHabilidad: Translations use the TRADUCIR_TEXTOS skill (configurable model in /skills). The skill's system prompt references Server_LM.md and Glosario.md.

tipoElemento.USUARIO_desc: User — available for any end-user role
